name: DeepSeekMoE 16B
license: DeepSeek Model License (custom, commercial use permitted)
archDisplay: MoE — 2 shared + 64 fine-grained routed experts (2 shared + 6 routed active/token), 4K context
note: Introduced the DeepSeekMoE fine-grained + shared-expert architecture; matched LLaMA2 7B at roughly 40% of the compute.
tpsNote: Fits comfortably within a 24GB RTX 4090 at Q4 (~10GB); no specific verified 4090 llama.cpp tokens/sec benchmark was found.
verificationNotes: Confirmed via ar5iv/2401.06066: 16.4B total / 2.8B active params, 2 shared + 64 routed fine-grained experts (2 shared + 6 routed active per token = 8 total active experts), 4K context, 2T training tokens. Base-model scores literally match: HumanEval 26.8, GSM8K 18.8, MMLU 45.0, HellaSwag 77.1. Release date 2024-01-11 corroborated by independent web search (HF last-update ~2024-01-12).
